dismissalText.commentary: Ishan Kishan c Jansen b Arshdeep Singh 27 (17b 3x4 1x6 26m) SR: 158.82

dismissalComment.html: ABSOLUTELY ABSURD! How has Marco Jansen plucked that one out of the air? Kishan flicked this one off his pads, from in front of the stumps. Destined to go over the ropes, except Jansen runs in from the deep midwicket boundary - and with his wrong hand - plucks this out with just that one hand. Arshdeep Singh is on his haunches, perplexed, hand over mouth. Justified!

images.caption: Arshdeep Singh was stunned by Marco Jansen's catch to dismiss Ishan Kishan
images.longCaption: Arshdeep Singh was stunned by Marco Jansen's catch to dismiss Ishan Kishan, Punjab Kings vs Sunrisers Hyderabad, IPL 2026, New Chandigarh, April 11, 2026

dismissalText.commentary: Aniket Verma run out (Stoinis/†Prabhsimran Singh) 18 (9b 1x4 1x6 14m) SR: 200

dismissalComment.html: Mix-up right as Aniket was gaining some momentum! Swipes at this full ball from in front of the stumps, not a great connection on this. Klaasen calls for a second run, so Aniket complies. But he hesitates for just a second, and it's enough for the wicket-keeper to break the stumps before he can make it back into the crease. Aniket walks off, throwing his head back in disappointment.

images.caption: Prabhsimran Singh and Marcus Stoinis ran out Aniket Verma
images.longCaption: Prabhsimran Singh and Marcus Stoinis ran out Aniket Verma, Punjab Kings vs Sunrisers Hyderabad, IPL 2026, New Chandigarh, April 11, 2026

dismissalText.commentary: Salil Arora c Bartlett b Arshdeep Singh 9 (8b 0x4 1x6 10m) SR: 112.5

dismissalComment.html: Salil hits this high, highhh, highhh in the air! He tried to keep a still head as he played this lofted drive with a high elbow, but his head fell to the side just a little. More importantly, he mistimed this ball on a length, near the stumps. There to be hit, to be honest... Bartlett ran in from long-on and his mittens collected that comfortably

dismissalText.commentary: Ishan Kishan c Jansen b Arshdeep Singh 27 (17b 3x4 1x6 26m) SR: 158.82

dismissalComment.html: ABSOLUTELY ABSURD! How has Marco Jansen plucked that one out of the air? Kishan flicked this one off his pads, from in front of the stumps. Destined to go over the ropes, except Jansen runs in from the deep midwicket boundary - and with his wrong hand - plucks this out with just that one hand. Arshdeep Singh is on his haunches, perplexed, hand over mouth. Justified!

dismissalText.commentary: Aniket Verma run out (Stoinis/†Prabhsimran Singh) 18 (9b 1x4 1x6 14m) SR: 200

dismissalComment.html: Mix-up right as Aniket was gaining some momentum! Swipes at this full ball from in front of the stumps, not a great connection on this. Klaasen calls for a second run, so Aniket complies. But he hesitates for just a second, and it's enough for the wicket-keeper to break the stumps before he can make it back into the crease. Aniket walks off, throwing his head back in disappointment.
